title: polypodium buergerianum var. ningpoense
intro: Polypodium buergerianum var. ningpoense, also known as the Ningpo maidenhair fern or Ningpo polypody, is a type of fern that is native to East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Polypodium buergerianum var. ningpoense include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially exhibiting anticancer properties. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, extracts, and infusions that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
